summary: An absolute monarchy and the world's largest oil exporter, custodian of Islam's holiest sites, and a key US security partner whose petrodollar deal underpins the dollar's global dominance.

history.detail: Muhammad ibn Saud and Muhammad ibn Abd al-Wahhab form alliance; ultra-conservative Islam + political power.
Founding of modern Saudi state begins.
Unification of Hejaz and Nejd; Abdulaziz ibn Saud first king.
Aramco (US company) strikes oil; world's largest reserves confirmed.
USS Quincy meeting; security-for-oil deal established US-Saudi relationship.
Saudi-led embargo punishes US for supporting Israel; oil price quadruples.
Saudi oil priced exclusively in USD; recycled into US Treasuries. Dollar dominance cemented.
Islamist extremists seize Mecca; Saudi government responds by hardening religious conservatism.
Iraq invades Kuwait; 500,000 US troops on Saudi soil — angers Bin Laden.
Al-Qaeda attacks US; US-Saudi relationship strained.
Saudi-led coalition intervenes against Houthis; worst humanitarian crisis in world.
Mohammed bin Salman consolidates power; Vision 2030 launched; Khashoggi murdered 2018.

finance.currency_role: Riyal (SAR) pegged to USD at 3.75 — the cornerstone of the petrodollar system

tech_startups.vc_ecosystem: PIF funding large-scale projects; NEOM, Red Sea tourism, gaming (Savvy Games bought Scopely, SNK)

resources.oil_gas: World's 2nd largest oil reserves; ~12M barrels/day production capacity; Ghawar is world's largest oil field
resources.water: Extreme water scarcity; world's largest desalination network

follow_the_money.detail: Saudi oil sold in USD → excess dollars → US Treasuries. Sustains dollar dominance.
$700B+ fund buying stakes in tech, sports, gaming, real estate globally

follow_the_money.flow: Khashoggi murder financing of image repair
follow_the_money.detail: Post-Khashoggi: $6B LIV Golf, $300M esports, Newcastle United — sportswashing

theories_disputed.detail: 28 pages of 9/11 Commission report (declassified 2016) suggest Saudi government links to hijackers; no official finding of state sponsorship.
CIA and UN assessment: MBS personally ordered murder of journalist Jamal Khashoggi in Istanbul consulate 2018.

connections.detail: Petrodollar deal 1974; arms sales; security umbrella
Sunni-Shia proxy war across Middle East; Yemen, Iraq, Lebanon
Covert intelligence sharing on Iran; Abraham Accords normalisation talks
Largest oil customer; yuan oil pricing trials
Saudi-led military coalition vs Houthis since 2015
